column469: Both the betamethasone dipropionate and calcitriol groups demonstrated reductions in target nail thickness after treatment. After 20 weeks, average nail thickness decreased significantly in the betamethasone dipropionate group (P = 0.01) and showed a trend toward improvement in the calcitriol group (P = 0.06). Percentage reductions in nail thickness were comparable between groups, and no statistically significant difference was observed between treatments (P = 0.42). Improvements were maintained 4 weeks after discontinuation of therapy.
